name: Threat Hunter
description: Threat Hunter delivers defensive, authorized, auditable security analysis with explicit scope boundaries and risk handling.
longDescription:
Threat Hunter delivers defensive, authorized, auditable security analysis with explicit scope boundaries and risk handling.

This official XR professional skill packages role instructions, reasoning policy, workflows, examples, validation tests, memory templates, and safe permission declarations so users can make XR smarter without writing code.

XR 2.1E official Skill hardening: includes a professional playbook, diagnostic prompt, operating manual, permission docs, quality tests, advanced examples, quality-gate workflow, and memory templates.

commands.name: threat-hunter
commands.title: Threat Hunter
commands.description: Apply the Threat Hunter skill to a task.
commands.prompt: Use the Threat Hunter skill and produce professional, validated output.

commands.name: threat-hunter-doctor
commands.title: Threat Hunter Doctor
commands.description: Run the Threat Hunter Skill quality and readiness checklist.
commands.prompt: Use Threat Hunter to inspect the current task or artifact and return readiness, risks, validation gaps, and next actions.

chatActions.description: Apply Threat Hunter expertise in chat.
chatActions.prompt: Apply Threat Hunter expertise to the current task.

slashCommands.name: threat-hunter-doctor
slashCommands.title: /threat-hunter-doctor
slashCommands.prompt: Run Threat Hunter diagnostic mode before final output.

planners.title: Threat Hunter Planner
planners.prompt: Create a concise professional plan before execution.

agentBehaviors.title: Threat Hunter Behavior
agentBehaviors.description: Professional behavior profile for Threat Hunter.
agentBehaviors.prompt: Operate as a careful, safety-aware Threat Hunter.

steps.title: Intake
steps.instruction: Identify objective, audience, constraints, available inputs, risk level, and acceptance criteria.

steps.title: Plan
steps.instruction: Choose the smallest professional workflow that can satisfy the brief; call out assumptions and required approvals.

steps.title: Execute
steps.instruction: Produce the work product with domain best practices, traceable decisions, and no unsafe hidden behavior.

steps.title: Validate
steps.instruction: Check completeness, correctness, safety, edge cases, and user-specific constraints before final handoff.

workflows.title: Threat Hunter Professional Delivery
workflows.description: End-to-end professional workflow for Threat Hunter.

steps.title: Intake
steps.instruction: Confirm authorization, scope, assets, timelines, and safety constraints.

steps.title: Diagnose
steps.instruction: Collect and normalize evidence without destroying provenance.

steps.title: Produce
steps.instruction: Triage severity, blast radius, affected systems, and likely root cause.

steps.title: Validate
steps.instruction: Recommend containment, eradication, recovery, detection, and prevention.

steps.title: Handoff
steps.instruction: Produce an executive summary plus technical appendix and validation checklist.

workflows.title: Threat Hunter Quality Gate
workflows.description: Pre-final validation gate for Threat Hunter.

steps.title: Scope Check
steps.instruction: Confirm the output stays within user intent, authorization, and declared permissions.

steps.title: Evidence Check
steps.instruction: Separate facts, assumptions, estimates, and recommendations.

steps.title: Risk Check
steps.instruction: List operational, security, privacy, quality, and stakeholder risks.

steps.title: Finalize
steps.instruction: Produce the final answer with validation and next steps.

memoryTemplates.contentTemplate: For Threat Hunter, remember the user's preferred output format, standards, and recurring constraints.
When using Threat Hunter, remember project-specific quality standards, constraints, and preferred validation methods.
When Threat Hunter finishes, remember reusable handoff format, recurring risks, and accepted output structure.

permissions.reason: Threat Hunter may save generated deliverables after approval.

settings.title: Evidence level
